meta.title: Oriflux — Web, product and API analytics, cookieless, on your own infrastructure
meta.description: The only analytics platform that unifies web, product and API. Cookieless, GDPR by construction, real-time, with an AI layer that runs exclusively on local models. Self-hostable, AGPL-3.0.

hero.headline: Web, product and API analytics. One tool, cookieless, on your own infrastructure.
hero.subline: Real-time, GDPR by construction, and an AI layer that runs exclusively on local models: not a single row of analytics ever leaves your infrastructure.

domains.label: Three domains, one tool
domains.title: What no tool on the market brings together
domains.lede: Web analytics, product analytics and API analytics usually live in three separate products. Oriflux unifies them on the same data model, the same typed query, the same dashboard.

cards.name: Web analytics
points: Unique visitors, page views, time on page
Real-time view of who's on the site

cards.name: API analytics
points: p50 / p95 / p99 latency per endpoint
ASGI SDK, < 1 ms overhead per request

privacy.label: Privacy
privacy.title: Cookieless and banner-free, by construction
privacy.lede: Compliance isn't a checkbox in the settings — it's in the architecture. Nothing to configure, nothing to negotiate with a DPO.

items.title: Zero cookies, zero banner
items.body: No persistent identifier in the browser: no cookie, no localStorage. No consent banner to display.

items.title: Unique visitor via daily hash
items.body: hash(daily_salt, project, IP, user-agent). The salt is destroyed every day — correlating two days is impossible, for us too.

items.title: The IP is never stored
items.body: Resolved to country / region / ASN at ingestion, then discarded. Never written to a database, never logged.

items.title: DNT and GPC honored
items.body: Do-Not-Track and Global Privacy Control signals are respected at ingestion: the request answers {"tracked": false}.

items.title: identify() rejects PII
items.body: Only pseudonymous identifiers are accepted — anything resembling an email or a phone number is rejected at validation.

items.title: 100% EU data residency
items.body: All data stays in Europe. The AI layer runs on the same infrastructure and only ever sees aggregates.

privacy.note: Accepted trade-off: retention and multi-day funnels exist only for identified users; anonymous funnels are scoped to a single session and labeled as such in the interface.

ai.label: Local AI
ai.title: An AI layer that lets no data out
ai.lede: Daily insights, narrative digests, natural-language questions: all inference runs on self-hosted models (SPT Models). Never a cloud LLM, never a row of analytics that escapes.

points.title: Local models only
points.body: Chat, embeddings and rerank run on your own GPU infrastructure. No call to any external provider.

points.title: Every answer is sourced
points.body: Every AI answer cites its numbers and the executed query — you can verify, not just trust.

points.title: Typed queries, never free SQL
points.body: Natural language compiles to a constrained, validated query object, never to SQL generated on the fly.

points.title: The AI only sees aggregates
points.body: The model never receives a raw event or an identifier: only numbers that are already aggregated.

liveDemo.label: Live demo
liveDemo.title: See for yourself
liveDemo.body: A public, read-only dashboard powered by the real traffic of sponge-theory.ai. The same numbers, the same real-time view you'd have on your own instance.
liveDemo.note: The link shows up here as soon as the public view is online.

openSource.label: Open source
openSource.title: The code you deploy is the code you can read
openSource.body: Oriflux is released under the AGPL-3.0 license. No hidden proprietary core, no "enterprise edition" that unlocks the essentials: the public repository is the product.
points: Public multi-arch images (amd64 + arm64) on GHCR
Python SDK published on PyPI under MIT

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Simple, by event volume
pricing.lede: Start free. Scale up when your traffic asks for it. Or host it yourself, with no limits.

footer.tagline: Web, product and API analytics. Cookieless, on your own infrastructure.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.lede: Everything you need to instrument a site, an API and self-host Oriflux.

guides.label: Getting started in 30 minutes
guides.desc: From creating your organization to your first event, in one script tag and one middleware.

guides.label: oriflux.js — web collection
guides.desc: The < 2 KB web script: integration, attributes, what's collected, DNT / GPC.

guides.label: Python SDK — API analytics
guides.desc: The ASGI middleware: zero host impact, < 1 ms per request, 60s-window aggregation.

guides.label: REST API & MCP
guides.desc: The typed query contract on /api/v1 and the read-only MCP server for your agents.

guides.label: Privacy model
guides.desc: Cookieless by construction: daily hash, discarded IP, DNT / GPC, EU residency.

guides.label: Self-hosting
guides.desc: Install Oriflux on your own machine: multi-arch images, readable docker-compose, requirements.
